# third-party

Local workspace for third-party research checkouts and comparison projects.

Examples:

- `rclnet`
- `zenoh`
- other ROS 2 / Unity / middleware references used during spike work

This release workspace tracks only this README. Concrete third-party checkouts
under this directory are ignored so the release repository stays small and does
not redistribute external source trees by accident.

When code or design is copied from a third-party project into `ros2cs`,
`ros2-for-unity`, or release scripts, preserve the upstream license and add
source attribution in the receiving file or documentation.
